data.content:
[Claude plan_review] Rejected: plan inventory is stale.

Issue 1: workflow.loom inventory wrong. Plan claims line 19 has 'output branch' and line 31 has 'output commit'. Actual file has 'output remote_main' at 6 locations (lines 7, 12, 20, 25, 33, 38). No 'output branch' or 'output commit' exists.

Issue 2: Profile override counts wrong. Plan says '2 lines' per profile file. autopilot_with_pr.loom has 4 'output pr' lines (6, 10, 14, 18). autopilot_with_pr_no_planning.loom also has 4. Total is 14 line changes across 3 files, not 5 across 4.

Design is sound: ArtifactTarget enum, legacy aliases, parser validation, canonicalization approach are all correct. Loom grammar accepts any ident so no loom-side changes needed. Just fix the file inventory and re-submit.
